---
title: "_bootstrap.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\_bootstrap.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 6
logic_score: 8.00
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 8.90
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `_bootstrap.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignBootstrap, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignBootstrap, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 28 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [os](file://os)
- [logging](file://logging)

### Exports
- `SovereignBootstrap`
- `execute`
